# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any parser configuration that allows external entities, external DTDs, or network/file resolution from untrusted XML.
4. Harden the parser configuration or use safer XML libraries that disable dangerous XML entity behavior.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System
 * Secure XML Configuration Parser
 */

class XmlConfigParser
{
    /**
     * @var array Parsed configuration settings
     */
    private array $settings = [];

    /**
     * @var array Errors encountered during parsing
     */
    private array $errors = [];

    /**
     * @var int Maximum allowed XML file size in bytes (1 MB)
     */
    private int $maxFileSize = 1048576;

    /**
     * @var int Maximum allowed XML nesting depth
     */
    private int $maxDepth = 10;

    /**
     * Parse an uploaded XML configuration file.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent Raw XML string from user upload
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded, false otherwise
     */
    public function parse(string $xmlContent): bool
    {
        $this->settings = [];
        $this->errors = [];

        // Validate input size to prevent denial-of-service via large payloads
        if (strlen($xmlContent) > $this->maxFileSize) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML content exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . $this->maxFileSize . ' bytes.';
            return false;
        }

        // Reject XML that contains DOCTYPE declarations entirely.
        // This is the most robust defense against XXE, SSRF via DTD, and
        // billion-laughs / exponential entity expansion attacks.
        if (preg_match('/<!DOCTYPE/i', $xmlContent)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML DOCTYPE declarations are not allowed in configuration files.';
            return false;
        }

        // Disable external entity loading at the libxml level.
        // Even though we already reject DOCTYPE above, this is defense-in-depth.
        // LIBXML_NONET  – prevents network access during XML parsing
        // LIBXML_NOENT  is intentionally NOT used (it would substitute entities)
        // LIBXML_DTDLOAD and LIBXML_DTDATTR are intentionally NOT used
        $libxmlOptions = LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOCDATA | LIBXML_COMPACT;

        // Use internal error handling so libxml warnings don't leak to output
        $previousUseErrors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        // Disable the ability to load external entities globally (PHP < 8.0 compat)
        if (PHP_MAJOR_VERSION < 8) {
            // In PHP < 8.0 this function exists and defaults to false,
            // but we explicitly ensure it is disabled.
            if (function_exists('libxml_disable_entity_loader')) {
                /** @noinspection PhpDeprecationInspection */
                libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
            }
        }

        $xml = simplexml_load_string($xmlContent, 'SimpleXMLElement', $libxmlOptions);

        if ($xml === false) {
            foreach (libxml_get_errors() as $error) {
                $this->errors[] = trim($error->message) . ' (line ' . $error->line . ')';
            }
            libxml_clear_errors();
            libxml_use_internal_errors($previousUseErrors);
            return false;
        }

        libxml_clear_errors();
        libxml_use_internal_errors($previousUseErrors);

        // Validate root element
        if ($xml->getName() !== 'configuration') {
            $this->errors[] = 'Root element must be <configuration>. Found <' . htmlspecialchars($xml->getName(), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '>.';
            return false;
        }

        // Extract settings recursively with depth protection
        $this->settings = $this->extractSettings($xml, 0);

        if (!empty($this->errors)) {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Parse an uploaded XML file from $_FILES.
     *
     * @param array $uploadedFile Entry from $_FILES
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded, false otherwise
     */
    public function parseUploadedFile(array $uploadedFile): bool
    {
        if (!isset($uploadedFile['tmp_name'], $uploadedFile['error'])) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Invalid file upload data.';
            return false;
        }

        if ($uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->errors[] = 'File upload error code: ' . $uploadedFile['error'];
            return false;
        }

        if (!is_uploaded_file($uploadedFile['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Security check failed: file was not uploaded via HTTP POST.';
            return false;
        }

        // Check MIME type (basic validation)
        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = $finfo->file($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        $allowedMimeTypes = ['text/xml', 'application/xml', 'text/plain'];
        if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimeTypes, true)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Invalid file type. Expected XML, got: ' . htmlspecialchars($mimeType, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            return false;
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Failed to read uploaded file.';
            return false;
        }

        return $this->parse($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Recursively extract settings from a SimpleXMLElement.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element Current XML element
     * @param int $currentDepth Current nesting depth
     * @return array Extracted settings as associative array
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $element, int $currentDepth): array
    {
        if ($currentDepth > $this->maxDepth) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML nesting depth exceeds maximum allowed depth of ' . $this->maxDepth . '.';
            return [];
        }

        $settings = [];

        // Extract attributes of the current element
        foreach ($element->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
            $sanitizedKey = $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName);
            $sanitizedValue = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
            if ($sanitizedKey !== '') {
                $settings['@' . $sanitizedKey] = $sanitizedValue;
            }
        }

        // Process child elements
        foreach ($element->children() as $childName => $child) {
            $sanitizedName = $this->sanitizeKey((string)$childName);
            if ($sanitizedName === '') {
                continue;
            }

            $childChildren = $child->children();

            if ($childChildren->count() > 0) {
                // This element has sub-elements; recurse
                $childSettings = $this->extractSettings($child, $currentDepth + 1);

                if (isset($settings[$sanitizedName])) {
                    // Multiple elements with the same name → convert to indexed array
                    if (!isset($settings[$sanitizedName][0])) {
                        $settings[$sanitizedName] = [$settings[$sanitizedName]];
                    }
                    $settings[$sanitizedName][] = $childSettings;
                } else {
                    $settings[$sanitizedName] = $childSettings;
                }
            } else {
                // Leaf element
                $value = $this->sanitizeValue(trim((string)$child));

                // Include attributes on leaf elements
                $attrs = [];
                foreach ($child->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                    $sKey = $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName);
                    if ($sKey !== '') {
                        $attrs['@' . $sKey] = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
                    }
                }

                if (!empty($attrs)) {
                    $leafData = array_merge($attrs, ['#value' => $value]);
                } else {
                    $leafData = $value;
                }

                if (isset($settings[$sanitizedName])) {
                    if (!is_array($settings[$sanitizedName]) || !isset($settings[$sanitizedName][0])) {
                        $settings[$sanitizedName] = [$settings[$sanitizedName]];
                    }
                    $settings[$sanitizedName][] = $leafData;
                } else {
                    $settings[$sanitizedName] = $leafData;
                }
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration key name.
     *
     * @param string $key Raw key
     * @return string Sanitized key (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots)
     */
    private function sanitizeKey(string $key): string
    {
        return preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', $key);
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration value.
     *
     * @param string $value Raw value
     * @return string Sanitized value
     */
    private function sanitizeValue(string $value): string
    {
        // Remove null bytes and trim whitespace
        $value = str_replace("\0", '', $value);
        return trim($value);
    }

    /**
     * Get all parsed settings.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getSettings(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific setting by dot-notation path.
     *
     * @param string $path Dot-separated path (e.g., "database.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if path not found
     * @return mixed
     */
    public function get(string $path, mixed $default = null): mixed
    {
        $keys = explode('.', $path);
        $current = $this->settings;

        foreach ($keys as $key) {
            if (is_array($current) && array_key_exists($key, $current)) {
                $current = $current[$key];
            } else {
                return $default;
            }
        }

        return $current;
    }

    /**
     * Get all errors encountered during parsing.
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Set the maximum allowed XML file size.
     *
     * @param int $bytes Maximum size in bytes
     * @return void
     */
    public function setMaxFileSize(int $bytes): void
    {
        $this->maxFileSize = max(1, $bytes);
    }

    /**
     * Set the maximum allowed XML nesting depth.
     *
     * @param int $depth Maximum depth
     * @return void
     */
    public function setMaxDepth(int $depth): void
    {
        $this->maxDepth = max(1, $depth);
    }
}


// ============================================================
// Usage Example
// ============================================================

/*
// Example XML configuration (safe – no DOCTYPE):
$xmlContent = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
    <application>
        <name>Enterprise App</name>
        <version>2.5.1</version>
        <debug>false</debug>
    </application>
    <database>
        <host>db.internal.example.com</host>
        <port>5432</port>
        <name>app_production</name>
        <username>app_user</username>
        <password>s3cur3_p4ssw0rd</password>
        <options>
            <pool_size>20</pool_size>
            <timeout>30</timeout>
            <ssl>true</ssl>
        </options>
    </database>
    <cache>
        <driver>redis</driver>
        <host>cache.internal.example.com</host>
        <port>6379</port>
        <ttl>3600</ttl>
    </cache>
    <logging>
        <level>warning</level>
        <output type="file">/var/log/app/enterprise.log</output>
        <output type="syslog">local0</output>
    </logging>
</configuration>
XML;

$parser = new XmlConfigParser();

if ($parser->parse($xmlContent)) {
    echo "Configuration parsed successfully.\n\n";

    // Access settings via dot notation
    echo "App Name:    " . $parser->get('application.name') . "\n";
    echo "DB Host:     " . $parser->get('database.host') . "\n";
    echo "DB Pool:     " . $parser->get('database.options.pool_size') . "\n";
    echo "Cache TTL:   " . $parser->get('cache.ttl') . "\n";
    echo "Log Level:   " . $parser->get('logging.level') . "\n";
    echo "Missing Key: " . $parser->get('nonexistent.key', 'default_value') . "\n";

    // Dump all settings
    echo "\nAll settings:\n";
    print_r($parser->getSettings());
} else {
    echo "Failed to parse configuration:\n";
    foreach ($parser->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  - " . $error . "\n";
    }
}

// Demonstrate XXE rejection
$maliciousXml = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE configuration [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">
]>
<configuration>
    <secret>&xxe;</secret>
</configuration>
XML;

echo "\n--- Testing XXE payload ---\n";
if ($parser->parse($maliciousXml)) {
    echo "Parsed (should not happen).\n";
} else {
    echo "Rejected as expected:\n";
    foreach ($parser->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  - " . $error . "\n";
    }
}

// Demonstrate file upload handling

//     if ($parser->parseUploadedFile($_FILES['config_file'])) {
//         $settings = $parser->getSettings();
//         // Use $settings...
//     } else {

//             error_log("Config parse error: " . $error);
//         }
//     }
// }
*/
